form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 8th of 11 at York on March 15 over 1920m, 3.5 len behind Gold Beau with 59kg at $26. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Bunbury Mdn on December 28 over 2200m, 3.5 len behind Electric Bec with 58kg at $26. Rates highly and expected to finish much closer.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last of 10 at Geraldton Mdn on November 4 over 1120m, 6 len behind Big Bopper carrying 53kg at $19. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped shortly after the start. Raced greenly throughout.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd of 9 at Albany Mdn on April 5 over 1600m, slow going 1.75 len behind Cosmic Gem carrying 58kg at $31. The race before that 10th of 13 at Pinjarra Mdn on March 22 over 1600m, 7 len behind Arrangement with 58kg at $21. Strong chance to break though.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months second last of 9 at Albany Mdn on March 26 over 1500m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Bit Tired Actually with 56kg at $9.50. Previously second-up came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Northam Mdn on October 16 over 2212m, 2 len behind Zoomachino carrying 56kg at $21. Out of her depth.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide from the 1000m. Compounded in the straight.
Threw its head up on jumping.

form.formComment: Most recently sat on the pace before fading 9th of 11 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1800m, 10 len behind Universal Impact carrying 54.5kg at $31. The run before that 5th of 11 at York on March 15 over 1920m, 2.5 len behind Gold Beau with 58kg at $14. Don't dismiss.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced only fairly. Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 12th of 16 at Pinjarra Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, 9 len behind Wheely with 55kg at $151. Second-up eased back early on 7th of 11 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1800m, 8 len behind Universal Impact with 55.5kg at $101. Can't have on recent performances.

form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at York on April 6 over 1920m, 6 len behind Saucisson with 57kg at $101. Before that ran last of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 12 over 1600m, 19 len behind Wynn Las Vegas with 55kg at $201. Can't see him breaking through for the maiden win this time.
